title: RenewalNeedsAttentionItem
description: One row of the engine's 'renewals needing attention' read for the live Renewals zone (F0038-S0003). The engine computes this list permission-scoped to the forwarded user token (Casbin ABAC); Neuron applies no independent authorization. Needs-attention rule: workflow state in {Identified, Outreach} AND within the configured window (default 90 days) of expiry, ordered by urgency, flagging renewals with no broker contact in 30+ days. Intra-zone only — no cross-zone ranking.

workflow_state.description: Only Identified/Outreach renewals qualify for needs-attention in F0038.

last_broker_contact_at.description: Timestamp of the most recent broker-contact signal, or null if none recorded.

no_contact_flag.description: true when there is no broker contact in 30+ days (configurable threshold).

can_draft_outreach.description: true when the current user holds renewal:draft_outreach and the renewal is in a draftable state; drives whether the proactive Draft CTA is offered (F0038-S0005).
